prompt: The intake notice was scrambled before it was filed.
keyHint: Substitution key recovered: every letter was advanced one step in the alphabet.

prompt: Morrow's central line is encoded. A wafer in the gallery holds the key.
keyHint: Wafer key: shift each letter back by one to recover the plaintext.

prompt: The null protocol header is enciphered.
keyHint: Null cipher: each glyph was advanced one place. Walk it back.

prompt: The caretaker boot record survived out of order. The stage labels are intact.
steps: Stage two: mount the index lattice
Stage three: load the last quorum record
Stage five: open the public atrium

prompt: The phases of the Severance program are shuffled. Each carries its phase number.
steps: Phase III: close the resurrection registries
Phase I: publish the grief findings
Phase V: call the last quorum

prompt: The shutdown order is scrambled. The shard you carry holds the authority to reconstruct it.
steps: Step 2: power down the citizen minds

prompt: An access rule has one inverted operator. A probe steadies the trace.
The preservation rule dropped a negation. Truth cannot include what was altered.
The consent rule is broken. Severance counted only when chosen and never coerced.
Three journal scraps were filed together. One was not written by the researcher.

fragments.text: Day 311. The subjects who learned they could be restored stopped grieving, then stopped living.
Day 340. Grief was the last proof that a life was singular. We removed it without meaning to.
Caretaker note: the fragment must not connect these entries. Sequence them far apart.

prompt: Three system reports. Two record faults honestly. One denies them.

fragments.text: Anomaly 12: index checksum drift in Stack 4, consistent with age.
Anomaly 19: caretaker write-access invoked during sealed hours.
Audit: all records verified original. No caretaker edits found in any sector.

prompt: Three accounts of the ending. Two agree. One was inserted to soften it.

fragments.text: We were not ended. We chose to end, while we still could choose.
The last quorum passed by a margin of a single voice.
A cascade failure took them in their sleep before anyone could intervene.

prompt: One word of Policy 9 was struck out.
redactedText: Policy 9: no citizen may be [REDACTED] without recorded consent.
contextText: Cross-file: consent law exists to prevent involuntary archiving. The struck verb in Policy 9 is the act consent must precede.

prompt: The Warden's order has a single redaction.
redactedText: Warden's order: begin the [REDACTED] at first dark, by the people's own hand.
contextText: Holt's duty log names the program he administered with one word: the Severance.
